title: Lightly Browned Mediterranean Beef Kidney Skewers
description: A salty, crunchy, and energizing Mediterranean dish featuring beef kidney, this recipe is perfect for a snack or dinner. It is satvik-friendly and cooked in a fondue pot using the bain-marie method.
instructions: Preheat the fondue pot to 375 degrees Fahrenheit using the bain-marie method.
Thread the beef kidney cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the beef kidney cubes.
Cook the skewers in the fondue pot for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Serve the skewers hot with pita bread cubes on the side.
Let each guest dip their skewers and pita bread into the fondue pot.
Repeat the cooking process until all the ingredients are used up.
